flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at James A. Rhodes State College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.0% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at James A. Rhodes State College rose 14% between 2021 and 2024 (1.4k → 1.6k).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at James A. Rhodes State College fell 11% between 2017 and 2020 ($13.5k → $12.0k).
